title: Crunch
description: Modpack aiming to enhance Survival mode experience by adding new weapons, bosses, mechanics and changing structures along with enchantments and its system
body:
Crunch refreshes the enchantments system, it adds new enchantments, reworking the enchantment table and rebalancing some aspects of the game such as enchantments themselvs, armor, potions, golden apples.
  
 With a help of few mods, adding three new and unique bosses, all hidden deep down the lush caves, behind the freezing colds of tundra and burning depths of the Nether. Defeat bosses, gain new materials, craft and upgrade your weapons!
  
 Crunch also adds new things to use in your arsenal, such as crafting new weapons using the new amethyst type, creating and finding powerful charms that grant new abilities and find some in the hands of hostile creatures, who will not give up their weapons without a fight.
  
 Explore the world that is familiar for those, who've been around since Beta worlds, but with an updated look with new structures and old, but remaded dungeons. Come on! Adventures, dangers and treasures await.

 Storage and traveling is no longer that much of pain, with a help of a simple, but useful backpack. Craft and upgrade your carriable chest to gain more and more space to store your items.

 Optimization is enhanced and game is running a lot smoother even on weaker machines. Modpack gives you abbility to configure your game to meet the performance you need, so you could play comfortably.
